name: Wellington Farmers Market
notes: Could not confirm any facts from a legitimate official source. The on-file website (wellingtoncofarmersmarket.org) is no longer trustworthy: a Cloudflare bot-check blocks normal fetches, and a Google-indexed page at wellingtoncofarmersmarket.org/vendors now shows hijacked/spam (adult-content) title text, indicating the domain has been compromised or expired/parked with injected spam -- do not surface this URL to the public as-is. The on-file Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/wellingtoncofarmersmarket) still appears in multiple third-party listings as the market's account, but its content is not accessible via available fetch tools (Facebook blocks scraping/renders client-side), so nothing could be verified there either. Third-party aggregators (marketspread.com, coloradolandcan.org, foraged.com, localharvest.org) consistently describe an independent 'Wellington Farmers Market' (benefiting Wellington Middle School Eagles After Hours) running Saturdays ~9:30am-1:30pm, mid-June to mid-October, at Centennial Park / 3rd & Harrison Ave (some list 3815 Harrison Ave), Wellington CO 80549, selling produce, bison meat, baked goods, crafts/art, with contact email wellingtoncofarmersmarket@gmail.com -- this conflicts with the on-file address of '4th & Cleveland' and was left out of fields per instructions to use official sources only, but is flagged here for manual follow-up/verification. Separately, note there is a DIFFERENT market in the same town, the 'Wellington Main Street Market' run by the Wellington Main Streets Program (https://wellingtonmainstreet.org/mainstreetmarket, Facebook 'Wellington Main Street Program', Instagram @wellingtonmainstreets, email wellingtonmainstreetco@gmail.com, phone 970-657-3486), held Fridays 4:30-7:30pm June-August at Centennial Park -- this is a separate market and should not be conflated with this listing.
